LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO INC.'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SERVE DEFENDANT AVVENTURA IN PORTOFINO, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, DBA PORTOFINO OR DEFENDANT ROBERT D. MUSANTE, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA PORTOFINO. ON JANUARY 7, 2014, PLAINTIFF FILED DECLARATIONS OF NON-SERVICE PERTAINING TO SERVICE OF THE SUMMONS, COMPLAINT, NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF, ADR PACKET, NOTICE OF APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER, APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER, DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF ISSUANCE OF ATTACH ODER AND ORDER FOR ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF ATTACHMENT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Ryan Dahm, Esq. for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCOX; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Continued To May-28-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO INC.'s APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is off calendar. Plaintiff failed to serve Defendant Avventura in Portofino, Inc., a California corporation, dba Portofino or Defendant Robert D. Musante, individually and dba Portofino. On January 7, 2014, Plaintiff filed declarations of non-service pertaining to service of the Summons, Complaint, Notice to Plaintiff, ADR Packet, Notice of Application and Hearing for Right to Attach Order, Application and Hearing for Right to Attach Order, Declaration in Support of Issuance of Attach Oder and Order for Issuance of Writ of Attachment. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
